title: Essentials Emporium 100pk Dog Poop Dispenser | Portable Waste Bag Holder + 100 Bags | Easy To Hold, Can Clip to Dog Lead | Blue Leak Proof Waste Bags | 5 Refills, Will Last 1 Year Plus!!
features: PORTABLE - Compact and lightweight design makes it easy to clip onto a leash, belt loop, or backpack, ensuring you always have it handy during walks or adventures with your furry friend.

DURABLE - Constructed from high-quality, weather-resistant materials, this dispenser is built to withstand the elements and the rigors of daily use, ensuring it lasts through countless walks and outings.

EASILY ACCESSIBLE - The dispenser features a convenient pull-and-tear mechanism, allowing you to effortlessly grab a bag with one hand whenever your pup does their business. Plus, the wide opening makes it simple to refill with standard-sized waste bags, keeping you prepared for any situation.

CONVINIENT - The dispenser's sleek and ergonomic design fits comfortably in your hand, offering a seamless and hassle-free experience when retrieving bags, even while juggling leashes or managing an excited pup.
description: The Cooper & Pals Doggy Doo Bags With Dispenser 40 Pack make walking your dog a breeze! These quick and easy bags are perfect for any outing; the handy clip lets you attach it to your lead, belt, loop or even in your pocket. Never run out of doggy doo bags with this convenient 40 pack! 1 x Cooper & Pals Doggy Doo Bags With Dispenser 40 Pack L 10cm approx 100 bags Includes clip Introducing our Bone-Shaped Dog Poop Bag Dispenser, the ultimate accessory for every dog owner's on-the-go needs! Crafted with both style and functionality in mind, this dispenser is designed to make cleaning up after your furry companion a breeze. Here's why it's a must-have: Chic Bone-Shaped Design: Say goodbye to bland and bulky dispensers! Our dispenser stands out with its adorable bone shape, adding a touch of fun and charm to your daily walks. Complete Set: Each dispenser comes with a generous supply of 100 waste bags, ensuring you're well-equipped for weeks of outdoor adventures with your canine companion. No need to worry about running out of bags at the most inconvenient moments! Convenient Carabiner Clip: Attach the dispenser to your leash, belt loop, or backpack with ease using the sturdy carabiner clip. This ensures that you always have waste bags within reach whenever nature calls for your pooch. Durable and Reliable: Built to withstand the elements and the playful antics of your furry friend, our dispenser is made from high-quality, weather-resistant materials. It's durable enough to handle daily use while maintaining its sleek and stylish appearance. Easy to Use: Retrieving a bag is quick and hassle-free thanks to the simple pull-and-tear mechanism. The dispenser's wide opening also makes refilling a breeze, allowing you to spend more time enjoying your walks and less time fussing with messy bags. Make walks with your dog more enjoyable and stress-free with our Bone-Shaped Dog Poop Bag Dispenser. With its eye-catching design and practical features, it's the perfect accessory for pet parents who refuse to sacrifice style for functionality!
